data.name: My Giant Sexy Sensei Bullies Me 7
data.detailed_description:
Unfortunately for you, Yuna's caught a cold and has taken time off from work, and with her absence, you struggle to focus on your studies. Without noticing it due to Yuna dominating you every day, you've become addicted to punishment and being dominated by her, and without her there to give you your daily dose of pain, your masochistic urges start overwhelming you after a few days, but fortunately for you, Yuna has a plan. As you visit and care for Yuna while she's sick, you feel good for being able to care for someone who's very important to you, which gives you a different kind of happiness, but she notices your sexual frustrations at not being able to be dominated, and she gleefully suggests that Kirita should dominate you in her house.

Since Yuna's caught a cold and is now sick, she suggests that Kirita dominate you in her stead. Experience a day of being dominated by Kirita, your classmate who is gradually getting more and more perverted.

  • ~3.3K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 17 Unique character images

  • 23 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
